programme.title: Rodney Laney
programme.desc: Rodney Laney has completed pilots for Comedy Central, MTV, and A&E. He has been seen on HBO, FOX News Channel's Red Eye, The Late Late Show on CBS, Comedy Central's Premium Blend, comedy.tv on the HD channel, two appearances on Gotham Comedy Live AXSTV, and Live in Gotham VR. He has appeared at the prestigious Just for Laughs Comedy Festival Montreal and LOL Lounge TBS Presents A Very Funny Festival: Just for Laughs Chicago.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Born to a black mother and an Italian father in New York City, Maija Digiorgios comedy centers on the examination of her own mixed-race identity. Digiorgio riffs on Thanksgiving with each side of her family, gender roles between the two cultlures, and her racist grandma in this special.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Following his groundbreaking win on NBC's Last Comic Standing in 2006, Josh Blue has risen through the ranks to become a well-established headliner at venues throughout the world.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: John DeBoer: Put it On My Credit Card

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: New York comedian Max Dolcelli uses his cynacism and enigmatic stage presence to riff on Waze, Dollar Store pregnancy tests, and how horrible toys were when he was a kid.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tommy Ryman grew up with a new-age, folk singing mother and a traditional, Lutheran insurance-agent father. This XY equation evidently equals: acclaimed comedian. Ryman has earned the title of Semifinalist on NBC's Last Comic Standing. Roseanne Barr, a professed fan, raves she has “never seen anything like Tommy before in her whole life, he is one-of-a-kind, fantastic!” Ryman also recently won the title of Best of the Midwest at the prestigious Gilda's Laugh Fest. Ryman's act can be described as absurdist and clever, masked behind a very likable and innocent demeanor, often thought of as awkwardly charming. He is a favorite among audiences at top clubs, corporates, and colleges around the nation.

programme.title: Daniel Eachus
programme.desc: Daniel Eachus talks about weird jobs, strange fears, and how to prank restaurants all through the lens of being the lifelong skinny guy.

programme.title: Danny Johnson
programme.desc: Danny Johnson's hilarious, clean stand-up has entertained audiences in comedy clubs, corporate events, and churches nationwide. Often called a cross between Jerry Seinfeld and Kevin James Danny's show is relatable, engaging, and always hilarious. Danny has starred in numerous TV commercials, Comedy Central's Laugh Riots, Florida's Funniest Comedian semi-finalist, Winner-Carnival Cruise line Comedy Challenge, Finalist in Search for the One Christian Comedy contest, and has had the pleasure of sharing the stage with Chris Rock, Bob Saget, Billy Gardell, Richard Lewis, and a variety of others. Danny has led a dual track career for over a decade achieving success in both corporate America and as a comedian. Blending his unique skill sets led to him publishing his first book, "You Stink and They Know It! A practical guide to nailing your next job interview."

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Cam shares his outlook on relationships and life through the eyes of a 23-year-old in a way that everyone can relate to. Bringing high energy and witty style that appeals to a wide demographic.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: When a Colorado town is overrun by the flesh-hungry dead, a small group of survivors tries to escape in a last-ditch effort to stay alive. With Mena Suvari ("American Beauty"), AnnaLynne McCord ("Excision").

programme.title: Earthstorm

programme.title: Life on the Line

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-F.B.I. Agent (Tommy Lee Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the Witness Protection Program (Morgan Freeman) have to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: Captain Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) is a brutally efficient 16th Century killing machine. Armed with his signature pistols, cutlass and rapier, he and his men unleash their bloodlust as they fight for England in war after war on all continents. As the story opens, Kane and his band of pillagers are carving a bloody path through hordes of defenders in an exotic city in northern Africa. But, when Kane decides to attack a mysterious nearby castle to plunder its rumored riches, his mission takes a fateful turn. One by one, Kane's men are picked off by demonic creatures until he alone is left to face the Devil's own Reaper -- dispatched from the depths of Hell to lay claim to his hopelessly corrupt soul. Though Kane at last manages to escape, he knows that he now must redeem himself by renouncing violence and devoting himself wholly to a life of peace and purity.

programme.title: Two For The Money
programme.desc: After suffering a career-ending knee injury, a former college football star aligns himself with one of the most renowned touts in the sports-gambling business.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-F.B.I. Agent (Tommy Lee Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the Witness Protection Program (Morgan Freeman) have to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: Jean moves in with her father in-law. Through time, they learn to forgive each other and heal old wounds.

programme.title: Allied

programme.title: Blonde Ambition

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married

programme.title: Guarding Tess
programme.desc: Doug Chesnic, a Secret Service agent is assigned to protect former first lady Tess Carlisle. Chesnic is desperate to get out of it due to Tess' high-maintenance personality and petty demands. However things change when Tess is kidnapped.

programme.title: These Old Broads
programme.desc: They swore they'd never work together again, their shocking reunion-still throwing tantrums, still stealing headlines, still making producers cry!

programme.title: All The Young Men
programme.desc: While holding position at a mountain pass during the Korean War, a platoon leader is mortally wounded and gives command to an inexperienced sergeant, angering the unit's more battle-hardened soldiers.

programme.title: Hook, Line And Sinker

programme.title: The Silencers
programme.desc: The first of the series of Secret Agent Matt Helm films, the big cheese of Big O, an organization that wants to sabatoge the American atomic missile system.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: Artists and Models
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.title: Thats My Boy
programme.desc: An athletic father tries to press his hypochondriac teenage son to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Hollywood Or Bust
programme.desc: A movie-mad nitwit driving across the country to his mecca, Hollywood, is joined by a gambler who wants to break into singing when they pick up a pretty girl en route. Once in Hollywood, the nitwit meets his dream goddess.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: The Palm Beach Story
programme.desc: Money makes the world go 'round, or so Gerry believes when she divorces her husband and marries a millionaire.

programme.title: Lover Come Back
programme.desc: All is fair in love and advertising in this delightful romantic comedy of errors.

programme.title: Jet Pilot
programme.desc: A pilot's marriage to a Russian defector is threatened by suspicions surrounding the Soviet's hidden agenda.

programme.title: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: Underhanded tactics, deceptions and an undeniable attraction escalate in this classic battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Daffodils
programme.desc: Leaving her dying father to perform a gig, Maisie explores her parents' heartfelt love and how it all devastatingly fell apart. Told through Maisie's eyes, the love story is expressed with re-imaginings of iconic New Zealand hits.

programme.title: My True Fairytale
programme.desc: Angie Goodwin, 17, along with her best friends, Sarah and Andre, go through a horrific car crash. While her friends miraculously survive, Angie disappears. She decides to fulfill her childhood fantasy and embarks on a mysterious journey.

programme.title: Melrose
programme.desc: A struggling actor on the outskirts of Los Angeles, takes a sketchy day job on Melrose Avenue, and uncovers the dark reality of living Hollywood in the twenty-first century.

programme.title: The Way You Look Tonight
programme.desc: Ditched after a perfect date, Peter turns to an online dating site guaranteed to find his perfect match, but notices strange similarities between all his matches and that first amazing date.

programme.title: Midnight Stallion
programme.desc: JACK and his daughter TERESA train a wild horse in hopes of winning enough money to save their farm

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Secret Liaison
programme.desc: A woman travels from Los Angeles to Seattle to try to prevent her sister from going to prison for murder.

programme.title: Get Out Alive
programme.desc: An estranged couple on a retreat have to put aside their problems to survive their targetting by criminals.

programme.title: Clover
programme.desc: Clover (Zelda Harris) is a precocious ten-year-old black girl living with her widowed father, Gaten (Ernie Hudson), on the family peach orchard in the Deep South. Her aunt, uncle and grandmother all live nearby, so she has never wanted for love.

programme.title: Like a Country Song
programme.desc: Billy Ray Cyrus stars in this tale of humility, forgiveness, and redemption. Jake Reeson is an up and coming country singer who has the whole world in his hands until his ego gets in the way.

programme.title: A Father's Legacy
programme.desc: An inspirational story of family, friendship and redemption. A young man, on the run from the law, finds his way into the life of a stranger. As days go by, they realize they may not have been looking for each other but were brought together for a reason.

programme.title: Comeback Dad
programme.desc: A man tries to reconnect with his estranged daughter.

programme.title: Part-time Spy
programme.desc: Government official goes undercover to a phishing group to retrieve budget, where she meets an undercover cop.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Dreaming of changing the world, Seo Chang-dae takes part in Kim Woon-bum's presidential campaign.

programme.title: Exist Within
programme.desc: Eun-soo, an aspiring writer, investigates noisy neighbor Ho-kyung for inspiration, facing a shocking truth.

programme.title: Inside Men
programme.desc: A politician and a wealthy CEO scheme with a reputable journalist to create slush fund and to manipulate public opinion. They use Ahn Sang-gu, a gangster deeply involved in politics, to manage their slush fund, but Ahn Sang-gu gets caught and as a result is abandoned. Sang-gu is bent on having his revenge. On the other hand, Woo Jang-hoon, a prosecutor without any powerful friends, is desperate to solve the slush fund case so he can get a promotion.

programme.title: The Best Thing!
programme.desc: One day, restaurant owner Justin Alexander's life takes a dramatic turn when he finds out from one of his customers that his deceased ex-girlfriend has a son in the child welfare system. This child is around the age of when Justin and his girlfriend split up. Could this boy be Justin's son? Determined to find out if this kid is his, Justin recognizes being united with this child could have frightening consequences. Or it could be The Best Thing!

programme.title: The 4th Quarter: Legacy
programme.desc: Aging quarterback, Dallas Hughes, returns to the game in a make or break season, after failing to lead his team to the playoffs and the team has drafted his replacement. Set against the backdrop of Atlanta sports, Dallas must come to grips with his future, while putting the pieces back together of his broken family.

programme.title: Weapons of Warfare
programme.desc: When 19 year old TJ, decides to leave the nest of his parents who are preachers of the gospel and turns to the streets for the love and support he always wanted. His life is turned upside down almost over night with gun violence, drug dealings, stolen money and countless crimes in the blink of an eye. His life becomes a tug of war between the parents that raised him and his new gang leader chief Who's bringing him further down to the ground.

programme.title: Suffocated: Room to Breathe
programme.desc: Lexxy wants it all: money, love, kids, a home. She has got the drive, now all she needs is the path. After a stint as a party promoter and criminal, she turns to the music business. Lexxy forms a female hip hop group, with dreams of breaking into the industry. Things look promising until lies and betrayal break up the group, and dissolve all friendships.

programme.title: For the Gram
programme.desc: Fired from her corporate job, Brandi moves to live with her cousin, who works as an internet model. Brandi follows in her footsteps and becomes successful overnight. Brandi craves the attention from social media and the lifestyle it affords her, but begins to lose sight of who she is. One decision could change your life for better or for worse.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: Inspired by true events. A one-night romance with a handsome soldier turns Tess Ford's life upside down as his attraction to her becomes a frightening obsession.

programme.title: Command Performance
programme.desc: When the Russian prime minister is taken hostage at a rock concert in Moscow, it's up to an ex-biker turned rock drummer named Joe (Dolph Lundgren, "Rocky IV") to save him.

programme.title: The Miseducation of Cameron Post
programme.desc: In 1993 after teenage Cameron is caught in the backseat of a car with the prom queen, she is sent away to a treatment center in a remote area called God's Promise. While she is being subjected to questionable gay conversion therapies, she bonds with some fellow residents as they pretend to go along with the process while waiting to be released.

programme.title: Shark Lake
programme.desc: Action legend Dolph Lundgren goes head to head with a bloodthirsty shark that has a resort town under siege.

programme.title: Elephant White
programme.desc: An assassin is hired by a businessman to avenge the murder of his daughter by white slave traders in Thailand.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Shania Twain
programme.sub-title: Still the One: Live from Vegas
programme.desc: The original queen of crossover country-pop Shania Twain invites you to kick up your cowboy boots and sing along to all her biggest hits in her "Shania: Still the One" spectacular. Known as the world's best-selling female country artist of all time, the groundbreaking residency show was filmed live at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace, Las Vegas. She takes audiences on a powerful visual journey through her biggest pop tunes, country favorites and beloved crossover songs. Many of her recognizable favorites stem from "Come On Over," the eighth biggest-selling album of all time. From stallion surprises to her dreamy ballad sequences, be amazed at this stunning songstress' talent. Glamorous costumes, a 13-piece live band, three backup singers (including her sister, Carrie Ann) and six backup dancers add more entertaining layers to the international superstar's first career residency.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Alegría: Mukaddes extraña demasiado a Murat. Kadir y Eve Nine pasan un tiempo solos hablando de su pasado. Fatmagül por fin baja la guardia ante Kerim y se permite disfrutar el momento.

programme.title: Historia de un Amor
programme.desc: Historia de un Amor - Acorralado: Ceylan no puede seguir mintiendo más y le confiesa a Korkut que mintió acerca de estar embarazada. Korkut Ali está cada vez más acorralado.

programme.title: La Novia de mi Mejor Amigo
programme.desc: Tank se enfrenta a la mayor prueba de amistad posible cuando su mejor amigo lo contrata para que llevé a su ex novia a una pésima cita.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Expiando culpas
programme.desc: Leonora visita a Sofía para confirmarle que Juan llegó solo y sin memoria al monte. Juan está a punto de ser trasladado a la prisión de Puebla, pero Sofía retira los cargos en su contra.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Traición en la mira
programme.desc: Alejandro escucha los planes de Mili y Hugo para irse de luna de miel e invita a Florencia a irse de viaje a la playa. Florencia ve a Alejandro besando a Mili. Constancio decide ayudar a Mateo para que se quede con la empresa de Domingo.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Un nuevo compromiso
programme.desc: David le dice a Fernanda que va a oficializar su relación con Graciela. Por otro lado, Marta espera que David le de la oportunidad de cuidar a sus hijos nuevamente.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Visita inesperada
programme.desc: Miguel aconseja a Octavio llevar a Simona a un sanatorio Maricruz se sorprende al ver llegar a Simona a su rancho, ella le sigue el juego a Simona y la invita a quedarse unos días.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Hombres enamorados
programme.desc: Daniela le dice a Gaviota que está preocupada por Rodrigo, pues sabe que sufre por ella. Alonso y Rodrigo compiten para impresionar a Gaviota.

programme.title: Teresa: Nueva vida
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: Rubí: Amores no correspondidos
programme.desc: Héctor está armado y secuestra a Rubí. Cayetano le pide matrimonio a Cristina. El Chuspa irrumpe en casa de Maribel para robarla.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica encuentra a Renato con otra mujer y borracho el bebé de Angélica sufre un terrible accidente.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Alicia sufre al saber que debe regresar a casa de Soraya. María idea un plan para evitar que Soraya maltrate a Alicia. Nandito enfrenta a Soraya para pedirle que se aleje de su familia.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya planea todo para que culpen a Nandito de la muerte de la Nana Calixta. María se molesta con Luis Fernando porque continúa bebiendo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se niega a creer que Angélica tuvo algo que ver con la muerte de los abuelos de Marimar. Arturo le pide a Esteban su aprobación para casarse con Gema.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica busca a Bella para pedirle dinero porque su bebé necesita una costosa operación Sergio le dice al gobernador que no puede casarse con su hija.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María idea un plan para que la policía no encarcele a Nandito. Soraya llama a la casa de María para decirle que Luis Fernando está con ella. María sufre al pensar que Luis Fernando está interesado en Soraya.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María le cuenta a Nati y Linda que Max solo quería tener intimidad con ella, pero que no la ama. Victoria le pregunta a Osvaldo si ha pensado en estar con otra mujer, él se molesta y le dice que no. Victoria se encela de Linda Sortini.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Bernarda le prohíbe a Tomasa decirle la verdad sobre Victoria a Juan Pablo. Osvaldo le pide a Victoria que piense un poco en lo que él quiere frente a la prensa. Max le pide perdón a María, la lleva a cenar y ella decide darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Adolfo y Ezequiel hacen explotar el coche del almirante Robledo. Amelia le cuenta a Fabiola la verdadera historia de Graciela.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Jose Luis corre a Rosario de la casa. Ezequiel le confiesa a Carlota que el padre Anselmo sigue vivo gracias a él. José Luis arresta a Fabiola por fraude. María se disfraza de Montserrat para meterse en la cama de José Luis.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Carlota ayuda a que Monserrat vea a Alejandro. Ezequiel le dice al padre Anselmo que Alejandro está vivo y que lo llevará con él. Fabiola le cuenta a Monserrat que Graciela es hija de una costurera y que su verdadero nombre es Gaudencia Jiménez.

programme.title: Teresa: Sentimientos no olvidados
programme.desc: Teresa continúa su venganza contra Aída y no pierde oportunidad para hacerla sentir menos. Fernando presenta a Luisa como su novia. Mariano sigue creyendo que Teresa aún lo quiere y la besa. Aurora los encuentra.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Unión y separación
programme.desc: Elisa decide decirle a Leonardo que lo mejor es separarse y no seguir con su amor. Darío le pide a Victoria que se convierta en su aliada. Majo descubre la traición de Clara.

programme.title: La Gata: Fuerte amenaza
programme.desc: Rita echa a Esmeralda de su casa tras golpear a Inés. Esmeralda pasa la noche en la calle y le pide a Rita que la deje regresar. Además, el "italiano" amenaza a Pablo con una pistola y le dice que se aleje de la Gata.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Convencimiento
programme.desc: Cynthia enfurece al saber que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula. Macaria entristece al saber que Ulises está cada vez menos interesado en recuperar su matrimonio. Rosaura le ruega a Bruno que convenza a Rogelio que busque a Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Celos
programme.desc: Bruno le propone a Katia que se vean en un hotel. Alex comienza a sospechar de Meche. Fernando siente celos al ver a Victoria con Hernán.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Visita en la cárcel
programme.desc: Gael se preocupa al saber que su madre está desaparecida. Sabrina visita a Paolo en la cárcel y él le confiesa que Florencia no está embarazada.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Fuertes sospechas
programme.desc: Rosendo intenta matar a José Miguel. Leonor descubre que Rosendo es el verdadero asesino de su padre. José Miguel sospecha que Leonor es la responsable de que Rosendo comprara sus terrenos.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer discuten sobre la boda de sus abuelos. En el noticiero "DMS por la noche", los locutores discuten sobre las noticias que exponen. El máximo exponente de la cinematografía, don Oscar, muestra sus mejores películas.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano elige a Vitor como el empleado del mes y recibe de premio una noche en la suite presidencial del hotel. Vitor es atacado por Chabelita, don Chava lo salva y le dice que todos los huéspedes son zombies.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le dice a Cipriano que un reportero va a ir al hotel. Anita cree que el reportero está muerto y un investigador va al hotel, cuando descubren que el reportero no murió, el investigador lo arresta por cometer muchas infracciones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano es estafado por una mujer que promete volverlo un famoso cantante, pero durante su presentación todos descubren la farsa de su voz.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Doña Chivis aumenta la renta del departamento, y la Nena empieza a vender tartas caseras para poder pagarla. El administrador descubre el agujero que conecta la casa de los López con la del vecino y avisa a la propietaria legítima.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Entre el bote y el agujero
programme.desc: Plácido está en la cárcel y Pierre trata de abonar la fianza, pero queda libre Jacinta. Los López tratan de tapar el agujero porque, si no lo hacen, se irán a la calle.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito accede a una apuesta con un compañero de la escuela para una carrera de perros el que pierda correrá en ropa interior con su familia.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acompaña a Fran a la boda de Karime y se encuentra con Emilia, una exalumna que reprobó en la universidad.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Romina se queda a cuidar a Miguel. Gandía pide a Diego, Giovanni y Tomás que encuentren al ladrón de su pluma. Miguel va a la escuela y Gastón lo corre, así que se esconde. Teo va al desfile de las Top Girls y se pelea con José.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego reconoce ante todos que hizo trampa para ganar la Presidencia. Miguel logra meterse a la escuela y habla con Mía. Roberta provoca que se le caiga la falda a Raquel. Mía se presenta en el desfile, modelando y regalando ropa de la marca Colucci.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía y Miguel se reconcilian y le dice que siempre soñó con volver a estar así con él. Rocco le insinúa a Giovanni que ante la careta de machito que tiene, se esconde un gay. Roberta le dice a José que se está haciendo daño.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía se reconcilia con Vico y Celina. Vico enfrenta a Pilar porque se entera de que ella causó su separación de Giovanni. Miguel regresa a la escuela y todos descubren que volvió con Mía. Tomás y Giovanni creen que Roberta y Diego andan a escondidas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma sigue desconfiando de Reverte. Santos le dice a Teo que si ya no se siente bien termine con José. Roberta se entera de que Diego está diciendo que pasaron la noche juntos. Alma vuelve a ver a Octavio abrazando a Roberta y le exige que la suelte.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma explota ante Reverte y le pide a Roberta tener cuidado con él. Lola entra al cuarto de Santos en la noche y lo besa, pero él la confunde con Lupita. Gastón descubre a Mía y a Miguel besándose.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel le explica a Mia que Gastón lo obligó a hacer un trabajo con Romina. Lupita le dice a Santos que la que lo besó fue Lola. Roberta le encarga a Rocco que la grabe cuando se le declare a Diego. Teo le pide a Jose que lo acompañe a ver a su mamá.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Ruth coloca una serpiente en la habitación de las hijas de Sofía. Ricardo intenta abusar de Jimena para llevar a cabo su venganza contra los Elizondo.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan le explica a Sofía lo que ocurrió con Ruth. Sarita le confiesa a Óscar que alguien intentó abusar de Jimena. Jimena sospecha que Ricardo es quien intentó abusar de ella. Juan y Sofía les realizan a sus hijas una prueba de ADN.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia le reclama a Juan de Dios por haberle ocultado que él embarazó a Mireya. Julia le confiesa a Juan de Dios que Rufino es el padre de Mireya. Josefina descubre que Dinorah era la amante de su marido.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Cliff who has a great collection of cars but Tom's main interest is with Cliff's son's 1957 Austin A35. The 1957 Austin A35 was restored by an anonymous person as part of a charity program.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: From his starting point in Midland, Texas, Tom and the Ford wagon cover solid ground and make it to Lubbock, Texas before a grouping of cars held captive behind a chain-link fence capture his attention.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom heads to Great Britain in search of some exotic barn finds and has some great luck at his first location where he discovers a Mercedes-Benz 500SEC AMG and a Jaguar XJS TWR.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom forgoes driving his 1939 Ford Woody Wagon in favor of another car that he's owned for years: his Fern Mist 1953 Ford Ranch Wagon.

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: For Mary, her idyllic view is the gently rolling and lush hills that define and shape Prince Edward Island. Will she find those views and the property for her expanding family?

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: Ali and Mark love the view of a vibrant and active harbour. They are searching for a home with views of a busy harbour a place where float planes buzz by and marine life frolics.

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: For Camil, living downtown with views of an ever-changing cityscape is what jazzes him. His family is growing up so he's looking for a bigger home with killer views of an exciting skyline.

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Andrea and Wayne see Real Potential
programme.desc: As this newlywed's family starts to grow it's time for their home to do the same. Andrea and Wayne are hunting for charm and character that for one means turnkey and for the other means DIY. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses that are livable, but somewhat needy. Once Andrea and Wayne buy, Sarah renovates the room they can't figure out, setting them on course for future renos!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Truc and Eric see Real Potential
programme.desc: Judging by Truc's massive shoe collection and Eric's DJ gear, these two have long grown out of their tiny city apartment. Their failed home to date search has been driven solely by charm and character. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes that tick these boxes with extra storage to boot. Once Truc and Eric buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that allows them to live larger than ever!

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: Kyle and Erika dream of escaping the Toronto rat race on a small cafe to start a new life in cottage country. Armed with a $500,000 budget, they tour a former lawyer's office with potential, a ghostly mansion and a tiny restaurant ... which one will they choose?

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: Andrew and Magda are newlyweds who dream of investing their nest egg in a cottage, where they can spend time with friends and rent out part-time. With a $400,000 budget, will they choose the lakefront cabin, the clifftop cottage or the Viceroy-style property?

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: With $600,000 to spend, cottage lovers Donny and Dora dream of a Muskoka cabin to keep their twin boys connected to the family into their teenage years. They tour a cottage on the shores of the Canadian Shield, another in a family- friendly bay, and one that tugs at Dora's heartstrings. Where will they choose to spend next summer?

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: Picton couple Paul and Lyn have $450,000 to spend on a dream cottage in Prince Edward County where they can enjoy the summer and travel in the winter. After touring a Hamptons-style cabin, a quaint cottage with Quebecois flair, and a third colourful property, which one will become theirs?

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: Actor Wade's dream is to buy a property with a view of the deep red ruby cliffs that hug the craggy shores of Prince Edward Island. Out of three places, which one will he choose to fulfill those dreams?

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: Views of powerful red rock mountains in Zion Canyon, Utah is something that Eva and Chris know they can't live without. Finally that day has come to decide just which property and view could suit their family best.

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: Ian and Austin are shopping for the ultimate view of crystal clear lakes, Muskoka granite rock and old growth Canadian pine trees, a view that is completely opposite to where they live now - on a dusty, working farm.

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: Jeff has always dreamed of outstanding views of a world-class high-end golf course. Now, with his wife Trish, the time has come to make his life long dream come true!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Jasmine and Kevin see Real Potential
programme.desc: They first thought buying a home would be easy. Seven months later Jasmine and Kevin are still living in a hotel room, undecided whether they should live downtown or in the suburbs. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, betting that she can help them bridge their location tug of war. Once Jasmine and Kevin buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that puts a lasting polish on a diamond in the rough!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Christa and Mike see Real Potential
programme.desc: How's this for pressure? Christa and Mike have 30-days to buy, seven-week old baby in tow! Sarah shows these two the potential of three suburban homes, each with fewer stairs than their current townhouse. Good thing, as Mike breaks his leg part way through the search. Once Christa and Mike buy, Sarah tears apart and renovates their deal breaker room, giving them a treat they so deserve!

Plus, Antoinette Bond and her mother-in-law Gloria Bond are settling their cornbread stuffing feud once and for all in a Thanksgiving Dish-Off!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Whoopi Goldberg, “West Side Story” Star Rachel Zegler, Drew's News
programme.desc: “The View” co-host Whoopi Goldberg stops by to chat her new holiday collection. Then, “West Side Story” star Rachel Zegler joins Drew to discuss being cast as Maria and starring in the highly anticipated new movie. Plus, in all new Drew's News, Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Martha Stewart, Drew's News with Phil Rosenthal
programme.desc: Martha Stewart stops by to whip up brioche and apple bread pudding, dishes on her thirst traps, the one person she's desperate to meet and shares why she has decided to open-up her Bedford home and gardens in her new shows. "Everybody Loves Raymond" creator and star of "Somebody Feed Phil" Phil Rosenthal joins Drew and Ross Mathews for a special Drew's News: Food News edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, "The Adventures of Qai Qai." Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's News with Carla Hall, Corn Kid Tariq
programme.desc: Carla Hall joins Drew and Ross Mathews for food news, covering an avocado ripeness detector and TikTok restaurant reviews. Carla makes frittata with Drew, while Lindsay Peers and Tariq join for a Thanksgiving craft at "The Craft Studio."

programme.title: Best Of Week, With Hugh Grant, Marie Kondo, Drew-Gooder Surprise
programme.desc: In a season two pre-party event, Drew's sharing her favorite moments from season one all week long, sharing bonus content and behind-the-scenes commentary on what really went down. Drew kicks things off by revisiting behind-the-scenes secrets Hugh Grant revealed while filming some of his famous movies. Then, Drew's dream came true when declutter queen Marie Kondo stopped by to share some of her favorite organizational tips. Plus, Drew has a very special surprise for Drew-Gooder Alicia White who created a non-profit focused on the revitalization and development of underserved communities.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Valentine's Day Show, Gayle King, Taye Diggs, Chris Appleton
programme.desc: It's Drew's Valentine's Day Show where the entire studio audience is filled with singles looking to make a love connection. “CBS Mornings” Co-Anchor Gayle King joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for a super-sized Drew's News. Plus, “All American” star Taye Diggs stops by to chat and gives a few of the singles in the audience some advice with a quick round of “Drew's Love Bug.” Then, celebrity hairstylist Chris Appleton is on-hand to help one newly single viewer get a fresh start with a brand-new look. Plus, Drew is surprising one couple with an engagement re-do.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Jenny Mollen, Nate Berkus & Jeremiah Brent Reptile Makeover
programme.desc: "Dictator Lunches" author Jenny Mollen joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from Ashton Kutcher and wife Mila Kunis's no closed-door policy to a mom who went viral for changing her son's name at 18-months. Plus, Drew and team reveal what science is revealing about your partner and stress and tackle the new butter board trend. Plus, designer power couple Nate Berkus and Jeremiah Brent are helping one viewer with her pet design dilemma outfitting her bearded dragon with a stylish new home.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "LongIsland Medium" star Theresa Caputo chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: 50 Cent Show Takeover, Ziwe, Drew's News with "SNL" Star Melissa Villasenor

He is the proprietor of Sukiyabashi Jiro, a 10-seat, sushi-only restaurant inauspiciously located in a Tokyo subway station. Despite its humble appearances, it is the first restaurant of its kind to be awarded a prestigious three-star Michelin Guide rating. Directed by David Gelbb.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling

And after weeks of avoiding The Beast, Tessa Blanchard must put it all on the line to prove she is the industries best in an epic Main Event Match for The WOW World Championship Title. Will The Beast finally make her mark?!
